allow: Bash(~/.bun/bin/bun --version && which node 2>/dev/null || echo "node not in PATH")
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3001/health 2>/dev/null || echo "server not running \(expected in test\)")

Bash(git add backend/src/api/socketHandlers.js backend/src/core/gameLogic.js backend/src/store/memoryStore.js backend/src/store/redisStore.js frontend/src/main.js frontend/src/pages/game.js frontend/src/pages/home.js frontend/src/pages/lobby.js frontend/src/pages/reveal.js frontend/src/pages/submission.js frontend/src/session.js frontend/src/socket.js frontend/src/state.js frontend/src/style.css CLAUDE.md)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Remove host concept, add live room list, 15-min inactivity timer

- Any player can now start the game, reveal, and play again — no host
- Home page shows a live list of open rooms; players join by clicking,
  no link sharing needed \(removes the mobile link-drop bug\)
- Replace host/player disconnect timers with a single 15-min inactivity
  timer that fires only when every player in a room is offline
- Add listRooms\(\) to memoryStore and redisStore; broadcast roomList to
  all sockets on every room state change
- Remove URL-based routing \(pushState / popstate / getUrlCode\)
- Role card no longer uses red/green border — both roles look identical
  from a distance; colored pill is only legible up close

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
